source: Android, iOS, and shared first-time-use physical configuration enum mapping plus facade file-operation characterization under shared ownership
description: Pins first-time-use physical configuration behavior families that must remain covered before any broader FTU model or facade execution moves into shared code.

expected.commonDecision: First-time-use shared ownership remains valid while this readiness manifest is executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS first-time-use facade tests continue to pin physical config enum projection, unknown enum boundaries, physical-config and user-id file paths, write-progress policy, sync sequencing, protobuf construction boundaries, public error mapping boundaries, platform vector references, and compile verification before broader FTU execution moves.

notes: This readiness manifest gates FTU enum mapping and facade-operation coverage only. Date parsing/building, protobuf payload construction, validation ranges, BLE transport/write execution, sync notification implementation, SwiftPM/watchOS fallback, and public error translation remain platform-owned until a later runtime slice deliberately transfers execution to shared code.
